title: Solid wall insulation installed under ECO4 and GBIS: Statistical audit results
text:
In 2024 TrustMark reported quality issues with some solid wall insulation installed through the following government schemes:

Energy Company Obligation (
ECO4
)

Great British Insulation Scheme (
GBIS
)

This report summarises the results of a randomised sample of audits, commissioned by 
Ofgem
, to understand the extent of non-compliance in solid wall insulation measures installed under these schemes.

Solid wall insulation installed under ECO4 and GBIS: Statistical audit results

HTML
description: Results of an audit of solid wall insulation installed through government schemes.
